raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase on the website XXXX for an advertised steam account for a specific game. The purchase was for a separate steam acct from my own personal one. XXXX was forcing me to link my own personal acct to their system. This was not advertised at all and I was not comfortable providing acct info ie. password/username. XXXX support was not helpful and they blocked my account for even just bringing up a possible chargeback as they were not properly listing the steam acct requiring a personal steam login. I issued a chargeback with Citi in XXXX regarding this. The process took a couple of months, during this time Citi never reached out for my story or supporting docs that I was not sold what was advertised. Then today XX/XX/XXXX they issued a decision saying I was responsible. They provided no reasoning or any request for the supporting docs I had. Their phone line is robot XXXX. They stated a email was sent but I can not locate said email explaining why this decision was made. Keep in mind this was only a XXXXXXXX XXXX  charge.
